executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned localization remains healthy, but the marketing owner loop is still independently red because primary-repo adoption is still measurement-pending.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Let the active measurement hold release, allow the scheduled marketing rerun to produce fresh outcome evidence, then rerun marketing and architecture independent verification.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus refreshed owner-loop artifacts

owns: The live Gateway-owned verifier-supervisor job is the scheduler authority for this docs loop; direct user crontab entries must remain absent.

Runtime health monitor with bounded repair authority only.
Must not inspect content-loop outcome artifacts or trigger cross-owner remediation except explicit timeout reruns on the affected job.
Any material change to this monitor requires fresh independent verification.
Generic blocked-channel ownership now lives under explicitly non-Reddit names to avoid marketing ownership leakage.
This loop was collapsed to one owner schedule after the old deep-review/follow-up split was found to share one runtime path and one result artifact.
Whole-system audit loop that verifies architecture health across owner boundaries.
When it repairs another repair/recovery loop, it must also arrange fresh independent verification before claiming that path healthy.
Owns pushing workspace research findings into the git repo with tests and sync proof.
Operational support loop; not a self-certifying quality authority.
Gateway-owned Codeberg-to-GitHub mirror sync. Codeberg remains source of truth.
Operational replication loop; ownership must stay explicit even though it is not a full verifier contract.

findings.title: Marketing remains the only live red owner loop
findings.mechanism: marketing independent verification still fails while workflow audit and health monitor agree that primary-repo adoption is still measurement-pending.
findings.root_cause: The live marketing lane is in an active measurement window and has not produced fresh Codeberg movement yet.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the scheduled post-hold rerun execute after the hold window, then recertify only if the marketing independent verifier passes.

findings.title: Architecture topology is aligned with live Gateway state after this refresh
findings.mechanism: Live runtime shows 22 enabled jobs and zero live disabled jobs, and the refreshed audit now matches that topology.
findings.root_cause: The previous mismatch was stale artifact state, not a live scheduler fault.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep architecture artifacts tied to live cron state on every watchdog run.

findings.title: Architecture-owned verifier path is green again
findings.mechanism: The verifier rerun passes because the independent architecture artifact is fresh against current runtime evidence.
findings.root_cause: Freshness-order drift was cleared by rerunning the independent verifier after refreshing the architecture audit artifact.
findings.recommended_fix: Preserve refresh order: architecture artifact first, then independent verify, then verifier.

findings.title: Docs remains independently green and stable
findings.mechanism: Docs verifier is pass and the recent stability window remains valid.
findings.root_cause: Docs owner-loop state is aligned across verifier and history checks.

findings.title: Live scheduler is otherwise clean
findings.mechanism: 22 live jobs, no live last-error residue, and architecture-owned health issues are absent.
findings.root_cause: Current runtime state is stable outside the marketing outcome blocker.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Let the active marketing measurement hold expire and use the scheduled rerun to generate fresh outcome evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing remains the only red owner domain and current evidence is explicitly measurement-pending.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining blocker or produces a sharper next repair target.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun marketing independent verification after the next measurable marketing action
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Architecture is localized correctly; only marketing outcome evidence blocks a full green system verdict.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Allows architecture to move from qualified pass / high-risk to healthy once the external blocker clears.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep the architecture watchdog refresh order fixed
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Freshness-order mistakes were the last architecture-owned false red.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Rebased the architecture audit on the current live 22-job Gateway topology and current owner-loop artifacts.
Regenerated the independent verification artifact after the audit refresh so freshness checks evaluate the current runtime state.
Revalidated the verifier contract against the refreshed audit and current independent verification artifact.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass after the active measurement hold yields new outcome evidence.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned localization is healthy, but Codeberg adoption is still flat across the active measurement window.

notes: Architecture green here means architecture-owned localization is healthy, not that the marketing owner loop is globally green.
Persisted disabled jobs are history only; live disabled jobs are zero.
Running-job snapshots are point-in-time and may include the watchdog itself during execution.
The remaining blocker is external to the architecture loop and remains outcome-evidence based.
